name: GenM
description: Developer of an educational platform designed to offer online marketing courses. The company's platform features free online marketing courses like email, social media, and SEO marketing created by industry experts, enabling students to acquire in-demand skills and also helping to find and apply for an apprenticeship.

name: Cenos
description: Developer of a simulation platform designed to democratize simulation with open-source and focused applications. The company's platform is a finite element method-based, computer-aided engineering software physical process simulation and computational modeling of induction heating, induction hardening, and tempering of steel, aluminum, copper, and other parts, enabling clients to iterate designs faster than physical prototypes for induction heating and antenna design.

name: Dimension
description: Developer of an on-demand waste management platform designed to make public spaces clean and tidy and make waste disposal accessible. The company's platform offers customizable junk removal, dumpster rentals, recycling and hazardous waste disposal, enabling customers to declutter with peace of mind and contribute to a greener environment.

name: Get On Board
description: Operator of an online job portal intended to connect the startups and tech companies of the world with fresh talents around the globe. The company's platform filters and curates jobs in the fields of sales, designing, human resources, cybersecurity, and many more in several locations, enabling job seekers to find jobs as per their requirements efficiently.

name: Buffd
description: Provider of broadcasting and streaming services intended to discover, watch and engage in various esports events. The company's platform aggregates and indexes every major esports tournament from various esports games into one destination to keep users informed and up to date in esports, enabling esports fans to watch every live streaming and access related data ranging from team/player profiles, brackets, standings and stats in one place.

name: Klutch
description: Provider of automated credit card services intended to improve financial life. The company offers a consumer credit card with automation that gives people control over their finances while saving time by allowing users to set customized rules on where, when, and how they can use the card, enabling cardholders to automate their finances and customize the credit card experience through their mobile phones.

name: Mero
description: Developer of a cloud-based platform designed to give predictive insights to cleaners and property managers. The company's platform uses smart sensor technology to provide a real-time view of a building's usage trends and inventory supply levels, property managers to dispatch cleaning teams to high-priority areas on an intelligent just-in-time basis, enabling clients to optimize the way buildings perform day-to-day cleaning maintenance.

name: Omnitron Sensors
description: Developer of an automotive sensor platform designed to permit autonomous cars and drones to travel safely with high-performance and low-cost sensors. The company's sensors offer full autonomy to self-driving cars and drones with novel silicon photonics processes for sensors in safety-critical systems, it writes the script for building high-performance and low-cost sensors, enabling clients to get tools to make driverless driving safe.

name: Pilota
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based platform designed to predict the risk of disruption associated with each flight. The company's platform uses machine learning to predict disruptions ahead of time and automatically rebook a traveler's flight for free, enabling passengers to add flexibility and security to their flights, save time and complete their journey.

name: Plant an App
description: Developer of a low-code cloud-based platform designed to facilitate rapid development and deployment of web applications. The company's platform allows information technology teams to translate their work, ideas, and processes into software with advanced code and orchestrating apps created by business users, enabling small and medium-sized businesses to create, edit, and manage web apps online with little to no coding knowledge.

name: Pluto Brand
description: Manufacturer of customized pillows intended to cater to individuals' body stats and sleep patterns. The company designs pillows after collecting data from customers through a questionnaire and uses proprietary algorithms to create custom pillows for their unique sleep profiles, enabling customers to find pillows that suit their sleep styles.

name: Shiplyst
description: Operator of a managed ocean freight procurement marketplace intended to let people search and compare ocean freight rates from various shipping lines. The company's platform offers transparent and real-time tracking, data security through industrial-grade encryption, global marketplace to choose freight forwarders of choice, enabling clients to receive end-to-end container shipment service at reduced costs, thereby increasing efficiency.

name: Silk and Sonder
description: Provider of subscription-based handcrafted monthly planners intended to help in mental wellness. The company provides themed monthly wellness planners and designed monthly planners, compactly sized with guided formats, empowering customers to be their convenient selves through self-reflection and self-discovery.

name: Sira Medical
description: Developer of augmented reality software designed to help clinicians with pre-surgical planning, training, and education. The company's software helps clinicians display imaging to patients in a way that is clear and understandable, enabling healthcare professionals to view human anatomy in a completely new way.

name: Thematic
description: Developer of a music licensing platform designed to empower music artists and content creators. The company's platform matches content creators on digital platforms with established and aspiring musicians, enabling artists to feature their music in online videos without the worry of copyright infringement.

name: Userpilot
description: Developer of a product experience software designed to increase user adoption through behavior-driven product experiences. The company's software increases user adoption by assisting product teams to trigger the right in-application experience to the right persona at the right stage of their user journey, enabling businesses to increase activation and stimulate feature discovery among users as their product evolves.

name: Amixr.io
description: Developer of IT incident management system intended to help engineering teams all around the world to stop hassling with IT operations, adopt new DevOps best practices and focus on making new products.

name: The Atlas Marketplace
description: Developer of an online community platform focused on modernizing the local government officials and staff. The company's platform allows users to share success stories, learn what's working in other cities, build relationships with partners and source new solutions and new partners, enabling local governments and implementing partners to solve specific civic problems.

name: GamerzClass
description: Provider of an online gaming platform intended to create step-by-step programs that improve gaming skills. The company's platform offers online courses, produces and sells learning material for e-sport players while also offering video courses in professional sports games that are developed in collaboration with leading players, enabling gamers to learn efficiently and improve their gaming experience.
